name: Medibank Private Limited
analysis: MPL has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.8561. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$4.8561, stop A$4.5540, target A$5.0300. Risk/reward is 0.58:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
